description:
Configure the Nx Witness VMS system's SMTP email notification settings at https://localhost:7001 to enable automated alerts. Authenticate using 'admin' with password 'Admin1234!'.

Required SMTP settings:
- SMTP Server Host: smtp.securecorp.net
- SMTP Server Port: 587
- Connection Type: tls
- Sender Email Address: vms-alerts@securecorp.net
- SMTP Username: vms-alerts@securecorp.net
- SMTP Password: S3cur3Ma!l#2024
